category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Git extension for versioning large files; official Git LFS site describes it as an open source Git extension.
display_name_sources: Official site and repository README use the display name Git LFS / Git Large File Storage.
docs_sources: Official Git LFS site links to the repository docs; repository docs README labels the directory Git LFS Documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and the official site describe Git LFS as a command-line Git extension for large-file versioning.
